message:
feat: implement all 7 tracks of br-1i11 deep audit hardening

Track 1: BTreeSet deterministic spill paths (storage)
Track 2: Contact enforcement observability — logged+metriced fail-open
  - contact_enforcement_bypass_total counter in ToolsMetrics
  - 3 unwrap_or_default → unwrap_or_else with warn! + counter
Track 3: Histogram Release/Acquire consistency + min≤max clamping
Track 4: JWKS stale-while-revalidate stampede protection (AtomicBool CAS)
Track 5: Depth counter single fetch_sub with underflow recovery
Track 6: sanitize_thread_id() defense-in-depth in reply_message
Track 7: Inbox stats cache wiring — cache-first lookup + invalidation
  at mark_message_read, acknowledge_message, create_message_with_recipients

Tests: 9 new tests (2 metrics, 7 sanitize_thread_id)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
